rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DOLORES RUBIN LEVIN TRUST DATED DECEMBER 22, 2017 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required to discuss the request for an evidentiary hearing on Ms. golden's petition and whether that hearing can be set without the participation of the PR of the petitioner's estate; and whether the parties want to be referred to pro bono mediation, again including a discussion of whether that referral requires the participation of the PR of Ms. Golden's estate. Finally, Mr. Abelson consents to a PFF serving as temporary trustee. no additional hearing notes will be filed.
